mapper.select: select HOUR(rental_time) hours, count(id) rentalNum from busi_order where date(rental_time)=date(now()) GROUP BY hours order by 1
select HOUR(return_time) hours, count(id) returnNum from busi_order where date(return_time)=date(now()) GROUP BY hours order by 1
select coalesce(sum(rent_payable), 0) countRentPayable , coalesce(sum(rent_actual), 0) countRentActual from busi_order where date(return_time)=date(now())
select coalesce(sum(deposit), 0) from busi_order where date(return_time)=date(now())
select day(date(rental_time)) days, count(id) rentalNum from busi_order where month(rental_time)=month(now()) GROUP BY 1 order by 1
select day(date(return_time)) days, count(id) returnNum from busi_order where month(return_time) = month(now()) GROUP BY 1 order by 1
select coalesce(sum(rent_payable), 0) countRentPayable , coalesce(sum(rent_actual), 0) countRentActual from busi_order where month(return_time)=month(now())
select coalesce(sum(deposit), 0) from busi_order where month(return_time)=month(now())
